date_of_article: 1906 (context suggests this year, based on discussion of currency)
original_snippet_context: Report on exchange rates and financial markets.
relevant_quote: A' taxa da 15 11/16 que foi a official de hontem, para letras a 90 dias de vista, a libra esterlina vale 15$298, o franco $608 e o marco $751. A' vista (15 5|16), a libra vale 15$421, o franco $613 e o marco $757, a lira italiana $675, cem reis fortes 3$49 e o dollar 3$178.
justification: This excerpt provides exchange rate information, including the value of the pound sterling, without expressing any opinion about the Caixa de Conversão or related monetary policies.
